# NTFS-3G upstream provenance

The `upstream` directory contains the `libntfs-3g` sources and public headers
from NTFS-3G release `2026.7.7`:

- Repository: <https://github.com/tuxera/ntfs-3g>
- Tag: `2026.7.7`
- Commit: `d327833ec1d5eb1358b6f2c37139f10a3460944d`
- License: GNU GPL version 2 or, at your option, any later version

The imported files are unchanged. ReactOS build files, configuration headers,
and platform adapters live outside `upstream` so future source updates can be
compared directly with the tagged upstream tree.
